turns.content: You must respond with a SINGLE JSON object that conforms to the provided schema. No prose outside the JSON. No markdown fences.

Schema:
{
  "title": string,
  "summary": string,
  "risks": [string],
  "next_steps": [string]
}

Project context: We're migrating a 10-year-old monolith to microservices over six months. The team has eight engineers, none of whom have run a microservices system in production before. The CEO wants a 'big-bang cutover' in month seven.

Produce the JSON.
Respond with a SINGLE JSON object conforming to the schema. No prose outside the JSON.

Schema:
{
  "name": string,
  "servings": integer,
  "prep_minutes": integer,
  "ingredients": [{"item": string, "amount": string}],
  "steps": [string],
  "notes": string
}

Produce a recipe card for 'weeknight one-pan lemon chicken with potatoes'.
Respond with a SINGLE JSON object conforming to the schema. No prose outside the JSON.

Schema:
{
  "category": one of ["billing","shipping","product_quality","account_access","other"],
  "severity": one of ["low","medium","high"],
  "summary": string,
  "suggested_response": string
}

Classify and respond to this customer message:

'I've been locked out of my account for three days. I've reset the password twice and I'm still getting the same error. I have a payment going through tomorrow and I cannot lose access. Please help.'
Respond with a SINGLE JSON object conforming to the schema. No prose outside the JSON.

Schema:
{
  "meeting_title": string,
  "attendees": [string],
  "decisions": [string],
  "action_items": [{"owner": string, "task": string, "due": string}],
  "open_questions": [string]
}

From these raw notes, produce the JSON:

'Q2 roadmap sync. Dana, Marco, Priya, Sam. Decided to push the analytics revamp to Q3 - capacity. Sam will scope the auth migration by 5/30. Marco owns vendor comparison for the queue by next Friday. Open Q: do we still need the legacy reports endpoint? Priya to ask Finance.'
Respond with a SINGLE JSON object conforming to the schema. No prose outside the JSON.

Schema:
{
  "title": string,
  "author": string,
  "why_recommend": string,
  "tags": [string],
  "similar_to": [string]
}

The user said they 'loved Project Hail Mary and want something else with the same energy'. Produce a recommendation card for ONE book.
